name: Chinese Cashew Tuna
recipeIngredient: 1 7 oz can tuna in oil, drained and flaked
1 10.75 oz can cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chow mein noodles in Crock-Pot.
2. Stir well to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 5 to 9 hours or on High for 2 to 3 hours.
4. Serve over chow mein noodles.
Serves 4
